title: 7.0 SAIL clock generation and edge detection

content.text: This page is to analyze the solution for Clock generation and edge detection which is needed for USS in SAIL
QC MCAL package doesn't include the PWM and ICU module
Can not go with this one, GPT timer is too slow
We can generate PWM using timer and GPIO module

items: Configure the frequency of GPT timer
Configure the interrupt for GPT timer
In the ISR, we can toggle the Pin

content.local_path: _images/7.0 SAIL clock generation and edge detection/image-2024-11-13_14-48-19.png

content.text: Better solution, we will go with this and make this concept work
QC has Clock generator hardware module which can be used to generate clock reference
Main domain also has similar clock hardware module
There is no MCAL configuration to configure clock, so we need to directly change the clock generator registers
Below is the register information to generate clock in SAIL_IO_59 pin

content.local_path: _images/7.0 SAIL clock generation and edge detection/image-2024-11-12_19-26-34.png

content.text: We need to refer BSP code to detect GPIO edge detection and trigger interrupt
